name: FossFLOW
compose:
name: slashnode-fossflow
services:
  web:
    image: stnsmith/fossflow:master-b69fc2e
    container_name: fossflow
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      ENABLE_SERVER_STORAGE: 'true'
      STORAGE_PATH: /data/diagrams
      ENABLE_GIT_BACKUP: 'false'
    volumes:
      - web_data-diagrams:/data/diagrams
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8176:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-diagrams:
    name: slashnode-fossflow_web_data-diagrams
